description_long: This is a tall, rectangular shelving unit with a sturdy black metal frame and multiple wooden shelves. The shelves are evenly spaced and made of a medium-brown wood, providing ample storage or display space. The unit features four shelves and two lower drawers, offering both open and closed storage options. The sides and back are enclosed with wood panels, while the front is open for easy access. The base is equipped with small wheels, making the unit mobile and easy to reposition. The overall design is modern and industrial, suitable for urban environments such as lofts, garages, or retail spaces.
description: A tall, mobile shelving unit with a black metal frame, wooden shelves, and drawers, featuring a modern industrial design.
description_view_0: Front view showing four open wooden shelves, two lower drawers, and the black metal frame.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wooden panel and the narrow profile of the unit.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the back of the shelves and drawers, with the frame visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a solid wooden panel, mirroring the other side.
